specs.title: cp-000: Messages area overflow-y-auto px-4 py-3 space-y-3 min-h-0
cp-001: Empty state icon container w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl bg-brand10 with Sparkle 24px
cp-002: Empty state text Ask me about this paper text-sm font-medium text-ink mb-1
cp-003: Empty state helper Click Summarize for a quick overview or ask any question abou
cp-004: User messages bg-surface-raised text-ink aligned right justify-end
cp-005: Assistant messages bg-brand5 text-ink aligned left justify-start with Sparkle av
cp-006: Assistant avatar w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-brand20 with Sparkle 12px
cp-007: Message text whitespace-pre-wrap text-xs leading-relaxed
cp-008: Related papers in messages use RelatedPaperCards with dense prop
cp-009: Related-papers message width max-w-95 vs normal max-w-85
cp-010: Loading Sparkle icon uses animate-spin class separate from bouncing dots
cp-011: Bouncing dot delays 0ms animation-delay150ms animation-delay300ms
cp-012: Bouncing dot styling w-15 h-15 rounded-full bg-brand40 animate-bounce
cp-013: Suggestion chips header text Try asking text-xs text-ink-muted font-medium
cp-014: Suggestion chip w-full text-left px-3 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs with line-clamp-2
cp-015: Suggestion chip hover hoverborder-brand30
cp-016: Suggestion chips disabled when copilotLoading is true
cp-017: Chat input form border border-t border-border-subtle
cp-018: Chat input styling rounded-xl bg-surface-raised border border-border text-ink te
cp-019: Send button p-2 rounded-xl bg-brand text-white with PaperPlaneRight icon 16px
cp-020: Send button disabled copilotLoading inputtrim both conditions
cp-021: Form submit prevents default trims input clears local input state then calls sen
cp-022: Auto-scroll messagesEndRefcurrentscrollIntoView behavior smooth triggered on cop
cp-023: Modal title Add Feed not Add a Feed or New Feed
cp-024: Modal max-width max-w-xl
cp-025: Tab keys url and browse not Add URL Browse Journals
cp-026: RSS input icon Rss 16px positioned left-3 top-12 -translate-y-12
cp-027: RSS input type url enables browser URL validation
cp-028: PubMed input icon MagnifyingGlass 16px positioned same as RSS
cp-029: PubMed input type text
cp-030: RSS Add button text Adding during subscribe Add normally
cp-031: PubMed Create Feed button text Creating during subscribe Create Feed normally
cp-032: Divider or text centered between border-t border-border-subtle lines
cp-033: Error styling text-sm text-red-400 bg-red-50010 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl
cp-034: Successful URL add clears feedUrl then calls onClose
